# Show interest virtual bank account to BFL customer

: Ranjan kumar Singh
Created time: November 12, 2024 11:43 AM
Status: Done
Last edited: February 19, 2026 7:12 PM
Owner: Lalit Bihani

# **What problem are we solving?**

- Customers are using the Principal Virtual Account displayed on the Volt app for BFL customers to make their interest repayments.
- Since customers are unaware that the displayed bank account is for principal repayments only, they are mistakenly making interest payments, assuming it will cover the interest balance.
- As a result, these repayments are being allocated against the principal, leaving the interest overdue, which leads to sell-offs and customer escalations.

---

# **How do we measure success?**

- Customer are aware that they are making principal repayment in principal virtual account and interest repayment in interest virtual account.
- Accounting of repayment is happing correctly
- Reduction in escalation related to wrong accounting

---

# **How are others solving this problem?**

---

# **What is the solution?**

## Requirements overview

1. **Display Interest Virtual Account on Flexi Pay Page Alongside Principal Virtual Account**
    - The backend needs to provide both the principal and interest virtual account details so that the front-end can display each account separately for users.
2. **Display Outstanding Amounts for Each Account on the Flexi Pay Screen**
    - Under the interest account section, display the **interest outstanding amount**; under the principal account section, display the **principal outstanding amount**.
    - Showing the interest outstanding amount will help users make informed decisions and make payments only when interest is actually due. If a user makes a payment to the interest account when no interest is due, the payment will be recorded as **advance interest** and applied to the next billing cycle.

## User stories / User flow

# **Analytics**

| Journey | Event name | Event property | sample value |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| User clicked on repay interest tab | REPAY_INTEREST_BUTTON_CLICKED | page | BFL_FlexiPay |
| User clicked on repay principal tab | REPAY_PRINCIPAL_BUTTON_CLICKED | page | BFL_FlexiPay |
| User clicked on copy bank account | COPY_BANK_ACCOUNT_NUMBER_BUTTON_CLICKED | page | BFL_FlexiPay |
|  |  | type | interest/principal |
